headline: Florian Plettenberg
body: 🚨🏁 This news, now official and confirmed. Contract until 2030. Florian Plettenberg (Plettigoal) 🚨💥 EXCL | Michael Svoboda to Brighton - DONE DEAL ✔️ Brighton have activated the €5m release clause for the 27 y/o centre-back from Venezia FC. An agreement between Svoboda and Brighton had already been reached. Medical likely next week during the World Cup. _dennisbayer SkySportDE 🇦🇹 —
raw_text:
🚨🏁 This news, now official and confirmed. Contract until 2030.




Florian Plettenberg (@Plettigoal)

🚨💥 EXCL | Michael Svoboda to Brighton - DONE DEAL ✔️

Brighton have activated the €5m release clause for the 27 y/o centre-back from Venezia FC.

An agreement between Svoboda and Brighton had already been reached. Medical likely next week during the World Cup. @_dennisbayer @SkySportDE 🇦🇹





— https://nitter.net/Plettigoal/status/2068376946577158220#m
